appliedUpdates.description: Clarified in `.factory/library/user-testing.md` that `.factory/runtime/http-server.rg` remains the live HTTP validation source for `http-validation-server`, while `.factory/runtime/interop-crud.rg` is the tracked compile/determinism fixture for VAL-CROSS-003.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Narrow step 7 so compile-only HTTP fixture features do not imply mandatory live `127.0.0.1:3111` probing when the feature contract is limited to deterministic code generation and downstream Go tooling checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `interop-codegen-determinism-and-validation-fixture` found the feature contract and recorded validation were satisfied with repeated `rgoc`, `cmp`, `gofmt -d`, `go build`, and `go vet` checks, while `.factory/skills/compiler-worker/SKILL.md` currently says callback or HTTP-facing work should manually exercise `127.0.0.1:3111` whenever possible.
